title: Is Dry Shampoo Good for Your Scalp?
body_text:
Dry shampoo is a modern-day lifesaver for busy women juggling work, workouts, family, and everything in between. But as convenient as it is, many wonder: Is dry shampoo actually good for your scalp? And what about when you're wearing hair extensions? At Studio One, we're all about helping you look amazing without compromising your scalp health or your investment in luxury extensions. Let's talk about how to use dry shampoo the right way.

If you're wearing hair extensions—especially hand-tied or beaded row—we recommend being very mindful of how and where you apply your dry shampoo. Avoid spraying it directly onto your extensions or the area where they are attached.

Why? Because "your extensions need your natural oils" to stay hydrated, shiny, and soft. Overusing dry shampoo near your rows can lead to dryness, tangling, and even early matting. Instead, spray dry shampoo into your natural root area (away from the seams) and use a soft bristle brush to distribute the product downward if needed. Keeping the product off the wefts helps protect your investment and keeps your hair feeling healthy longer.

When used correctly, dry shampoo does wonders for extending the life of your style. Whether you're stretching your blowout or trying to save time on busy mornings, it helps absorb excess oil at the scalp and gives your hair volume and texture.

It's the perfect go-to between washes, especially if you've just had a fresh color or are trying to keep your extensions lasting as long as possible. "It buys you time without sacrificing your look."

We always recommend applying your dry shampoo at night, not in the morning. This gives it time to absorb excess oils while you sleep, so your hair feels fresher by morning—without the powdery buildup.

But here's the catch: not all dry shampoos are created equal. "Cheap products can leave residue and irritate your scalp", especially with repeated use. And while it's a helpful styling aid, dry shampoo should never replace actual washing for too long. Your scalp needs a proper cleanse to stay balanced, healthy, and free from buildup.

That's why at Studio One, we carry luxury dry shampoos like the Serene Scalp Oil Control Powder from Oribe. It's clean, effective, and gentle—formulated to support a healthy scalp while keeping your hair looking fresh and fabulous.
